Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Advanced From Jan-12-09 To Dec-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Status Report Of Executor
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Off Calendar

Status Report Of Executor
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Continued To Oct-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for and with Sandra Jeong (Executor).

The Court stated that the estate had been open for a long period of time. Mr. Schultz stated that the idea was to maintain the assets of the estate and that the Client was trying to put the estate in an optimal position. In addition, he stated that there was a proposed feasible plan to close the estate, that he needed to form a LLC which could be prepared by the end of the year, that he wanted to do a preliminary distribution and do a final at the end of the year. Mr. Schultz requested the matter be continued to the end of the year. The matter was continued to October 27, 2008 for status on the final distribution.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.
